College of Education at Albany Immediate

Frank G. Carrino HO31254 Ex. 75

TO: Greenville Local

George E. Bleezarde, Bditor, 164 Main Street Ravena, New York.

Dr, Evan R. Collins, President of the State University College of Education, Albany, will speak at thedinner meeting of the Albany College of Education Library Aluani Association on Thursday evening, October 12, This dinner will celebrate the 355th anniversary of the founding of the Department of Librarianship, and will be held in conjunction with the New York Library Association Conference at the Laurels Hotel and Country Club, Monticello, New York.

Dr. Irving Verechoor, new director of the Depertment of Librarianship, and Professor Robert Burgess, who recently returned from two and one-half years in Korea, will greet the Alumni. Guests of honor will be Miss Georgiana Maar, President elect of the New York Library Association, and Mrs. Augusta Baker, coordinator of Children’s Services, New York Public Library. Both Miss Maar and Mre. Beker are graduates of the Department of Librarianship at Albany.

Mr. Robert Chatterton, Librarian of the Greenville Central School is the

Treasurer of this Alumni Association.

Same newsletter sent to following: Ravena News-Herald, George E. Bleezarde, Ed.,164 Main St., Ravena, N. Y. Knickerbocker News, R.Fichenburg, Ed., Albany Times Union, J. Leary, Ed., Albany. Troy Record, Alton T. Sliter, Ed., 501 Broadway, Troy) Schenectady Gazette, John E, Hume, Jr., Ed., | 334 State Street, Schenectady. | Schenectady Union Star, H.R.Ekins, Ed., 211 Clinton St Monticello Bulletin-Sentinel, Rubin J. Katz,Publ., | Monticello, N.Y. Monticello News, Gerald Gunthrop, Ed.,203 Broadway, | Monticello, N.Y. Monticello Republican Watchman,Alvin O.Benton, Ed. | Monticello, |, |
